info.title: Spillgebees.Transmodel.Generator
info.description: CLI tool for generating C# XML bindings from NeTEx (Network Timetable Exchange) and SIRI (Service Interface for Real-time Information) XSD schemas. Downloads schemas from the official NeTEx-CEN and SIRI-CEN repositories and generates modern C# XML bindings using XmlSchemaClassGenerator.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Spillgebees Transmodel Generator - Generate C# XML bindings from NeTEx and SIRI XSD schemas

commands.name: generate-netex
commands.description: Generate C# XML bindings from NeTEx XSD schemas

options.name: --version
options.description: NeTEx schema version tag (e.g., v1.3.1, v1.2) [default: v1.3.1]

options.name: --ref
options.description: Git ref (branch name or commit SHA). Mutually exclusive with --version.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated C# files [default: ./Generated]

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Root C# namespace. Sub-namespaces .NeTEx, .SIRI, .GML are appended automatically. [default: NeTEx.Models]

options.name: --clean
options.description: Delete output directory before generating [default: False]

commands.name: generate-siri
commands.description: Generate C# XML bindings from SIRI XSD schemas

options.name: --version
options.description: SIRI schema version tag (e.g., v2.2) [default: v2.2]

options.name: --ref
options.description: Git ref (branch name or commit SHA). Mutually exclusive with --version.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated C# files [default: ./Generated]

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Root C# namespace. Sub-namespaces .SIRI, .IFOPT, .ACSB, .DATEX2, .WSDL, .GML are appended automatically. [default: SIRI.Models]

options.name: --clean
options.description: Delete output directory before generating [default: False]

commands.name: list-netex-versions
commands.description: List available NeTEx schema versions from the official repository

commands.name: list-siri-versions
commands.description: List available SIRI schema versions from the official repository
